no: BG1:EE NPC mod. INSTALL ISSUE: not on EET's recognized mod list. EET aborts with 'ZAKRION_BG1 BG:EE mod is not recognized by EET' when it's in the BG1EE WeiDU.log. Cannot be used with EET unless an EET compatibility patch is created for it. The BG2 version (Zakrion_BG2) is a separate mod and works fine post-EET.
sum: Adds Zakrion, a human Duelist NPC to BGEE, found near a ship wreckage on the Sword Coast, with custom portraits, voicing, a friendship track, and a semi-romance path.

co.no: Main NPC component. Adds Duelist kit and Zakrion NPC to BG1. Must install pre-EET.

co.n: Change Zakrion's class to Swashbuckler (from Duelist)
co.tp2n: Change Zakrion's class to Swashbuckler (from Duelist)

co.n: Alternative Portrait 1 by Nyaka-N at DeviantArt
co.tp2n: Alternative Portrait 1 by Nyaka-N at DeviantArt

co.n: Alternative Portrait 1 by Nyaka-N at DeviantArt
co.no: v18 moved to cn:2 (was cn:2001 in older version)
